name: The Fool
upright_meaning: New beginnings, spontaneity, a leap of faith, innocence, and unlimited potential.
reversed_meaning: Recklessness, naivety, poor judgment, hesitancy, and being taken advantage of.

name: The Magician
upright_meaning: Manifestation, resourcefulness, willpower, and having the tools to act.
reversed_meaning: Manipulation, poor planning, untapped talents, and deception.

name: The High Priestess
upright_meaning: Intuition, sacred knowledge, mystery, and the subconscious mind.
reversed_meaning: Secrets withheld, disconnection from intuition, and surface-level knowledge.

name: The Empress
upright_meaning: Abundance, nurturing, fertility, and connection to nature.
reversed_meaning: Creative block, dependence, neglect, and smothering.

name: The Emperor
upright_meaning: Authority, structure, control, and fatherly stability.
reversed_meaning: Domination, rigidity, excessive control, and lack of discipline.

name: The Hierophant
upright_meaning: Tradition, spiritual guidance, conformity, and institutions.
reversed_meaning: Rebellion, unconventionality, breaking with tradition.

name: The Lovers
upright_meaning: Love, harmony, alignment of values, and meaningful choices.
reversed_meaning: Disharmony, misalignment of values, and difficult choices.

name: The Chariot
upright_meaning: Willpower, determination, victory, and control through focus.
reversed_meaning: Lack of direction, aggression, and loss of control.

name: Strength
upright_meaning: Courage, compassion, inner strength, and patience.
reversed_meaning: Self-doubt, weakness, insecurity, and lack of self-discipline.

name: The Hermit
upright_meaning: Introspection, solitude, inner guidance, and soul-searching.
reversed_meaning: Isolation, loneliness, withdrawal, and avoidance.

name: Wheel of Fortune
upright_meaning: Cycles, fate, turning points, and unexpected change.
reversed_meaning: Bad luck, resistance to change, and breaking negative cycles.

name: Justice
upright_meaning: Fairness, truth, cause and effect, and accountability.
reversed_meaning: Unfairness, dishonesty, avoiding accountability, and imbalance.

name: The Hanged Man
upright_meaning: Surrender, letting go, new perspectives, and pause.
reversed_meaning: Stalling, resistance, needless sacrifice, and indecision.

name: Death
upright_meaning: Endings, transformation, transition, and letting go of the old.
reversed_meaning: Resistance to change, stagnation, and fear of endings.

name: Temperance
upright_meaning: Balance, moderation, patience, and blending opposites.
reversed_meaning: Imbalance, excess, impatience, and lack of harmony.

name: The Devil
upright_meaning: Bondage, addiction, materialism, and unhealthy attachments.
reversed_meaning: Breaking free, reclaiming power, and releasing negative patterns.

name: The Tower
upright_meaning: Sudden upheaval, revelation, and destruction of false structures.
reversed_meaning: Averting disaster, delayed disruption, and fear of change.

name: The Star
upright_meaning: Hope, faith, renewal, and inspiration.
reversed_meaning: Despair, self-doubt, disconnection, and loss of faith.

name: The Moon
upright_meaning: Illusion, intuition, subconscious fears, and uncertainty.
reversed_meaning: Confusion released, repressed emotion surfacing, and clarity returning.

name: The Sun
upright_meaning: Joy, success, vitality, and positivity.
reversed_meaning: Temporary sadness, unrealistic expectations, and inner clarity delayed.

name: Judgement
upright_meaning: Reflection, reckoning, awakening, and rebirth.
reversed_meaning: Self-doubt, harsh self-judgment, and ignoring a call to change.

name: The World
upright_meaning: Completion, fulfillment, wholeness, and accomplishment.
reversed_meaning: Incompletion, delays, and lack of closure.

name: Ten of Wands
upright_meaning: Burden, responsibility, and being overloaded.
reversed_meaning: Delegation, releasing burdens, and burnout.

name: Ace of Wands
upright_meaning: A spark of inspiration, new creative energy, and potential.
reversed_meaning: Delays, lack of motivation, and creative blocks.

name: Two of Wands
upright_meaning: Planning ahead, making decisions, and weighing options for the future.
reversed_meaning: Fear of change, playing it safe, and lack of planning.

name: Three of Wands
upright_meaning: Expansion, foresight, and awaiting results of effort.
reversed_meaning: Delays, lack of foresight, and unexpected setbacks.

name: Four of Wands
upright_meaning: Celebration, homecoming, and community harmony.
reversed_meaning: Instability at home, lack of support, and canceled celebrations.

name: Five of Wands
upright_meaning: Conflict, competition, and creative tension.
reversed_meaning: Avoiding conflict, inner turmoil, and unresolved tension.

name: Six of Wands
upright_meaning: Victory, public recognition, and self-confidence.
reversed_meaning: Ego, lack of recognition, and delayed success.

name: Seven of Wands
upright_meaning: Perseverance, defending one's position, and standing ground.
reversed_meaning: Overwhelm, giving up, and feeling attacked.

name: Eight of Wands
upright_meaning: Swift action, rapid movement, and alignment.
reversed_meaning: Delays, frustration, and slowing down.

name: Nine of Wands
upright_meaning: Resilience, persistence, and last stretch of effort.
reversed_meaning: Exhaustion, defensiveness, and giving up close to the end.

name: Page of Wands
upright_meaning: Enthusiasm, exploration, and a free spirit with new ideas.
reversed_meaning: Lack of direction, procrastination, and unrealistic plans.

name: Knight of Wands
upright_meaning: Energy, passion, and impulsive action.
reversed_meaning: Recklessness, haste, and scattered energy.

name: Queen of Wands
upright_meaning: Confidence, independence, and vibrant determination.
reversed_meaning: Insecurity, jealousy, and demanding energy.

name: King of Wands
upright_meaning: Bold leadership, vision, and entrepreneurial spirit.
reversed_meaning: Impulsiveness, ruthlessness, and overbearing pride.

name: Ten of Cups
upright_meaning: Emotional fulfillment, harmony, and lasting happiness.
reversed_meaning: Broken family, disconnection, and unfulfilled expectations.

name: Ace of Cups
upright_meaning: New emotions, love, and spiritual or creative fulfillment.
reversed_meaning: Emotional loss, blocked feelings, and emptiness.

name: Two of Cups
upright_meaning: Partnership, mutual attraction, and connection.
reversed_meaning: Imbalance in a relationship, tension, and miscommunication.

name: Three of Cups
upright_meaning: Friendship, celebration, and community joy.
reversed_meaning: Overindulgence, gossip, and isolation from friends.

name: Four of Cups
upright_meaning: Contemplation, apathy, and reevaluating what matters.
reversed_meaning: Renewed motivation, missed opportunities, and boredom passing.

name: Five of Cups
upright_meaning: Loss, grief, and focusing on regret.
reversed_meaning: Acceptance, moving on, and finding peace after loss.

name: Six of Cups
upright_meaning: Nostalgia, childhood memories, and innocent joy.
reversed_meaning: Living in the past, unrealistic nostalgia, and moving forward.

name: Seven of Cups
upright_meaning: Choices, fantasy, and wishful thinking.
reversed_meaning: Clarity, focused choices, and overcoming illusions.

name: Eight of Cups
upright_meaning: Walking away, seeking deeper meaning, and disillusionment.
reversed_meaning: Fear of moving on, stagnation, and avoidance.

name: Nine of Cups
upright_meaning: Satisfaction, emotional contentment, and wishes fulfilled.
reversed_meaning: Overindulgence, complacency, and unfulfilled desires.

name: Page of Cups
upright_meaning: Emotional openness, creative messages, and curiosity.
reversed_meaning: Emotional immaturity, insecurity, and unrealistic ideas.

name: Knight of Cups
upright_meaning: Romance, charm, and following the heart.
reversed_meaning: Moodiness, unrealistic idealism, and disappointment.

name: Queen of Cups
upright_meaning: Compassion, emotional security, and intuitive care.
reversed_meaning: Emotional insecurity, moodiness, and overwhelm.

name: King of Cups
upright_meaning: Emotional balance, diplomacy, and calm wisdom.
reversed_meaning: Emotional manipulation, moodiness, and volatility.

name: Ten of Swords
upright_meaning: Painful endings, betrayal, and rock bottom.
reversed_meaning: Recovery, resilience, and gradual healing.

name: Ace of Swords
upright_meaning: Clarity, breakthrough, and new mental focus.
reversed_meaning: Confusion, miscommunication, and clouded judgment.

name: Two of Swords
upright_meaning: Difficult choices, stalemate, and weighing decisions.
reversed_meaning: Indecision, information overload, and avoiding truth.

name: Three of Swords
upright_meaning: Heartbreak, grief, and painful truths.
reversed_meaning: Healing, forgiveness, and moving past pain.

name: Four of Swords
upright_meaning: Rest, recovery, and mental stillness.
reversed_meaning: Restlessness, burnout, and resisting rest.

name: Five of Swords
upright_meaning: Conflict, win-at-all-costs, and tension.
reversed_meaning: Reconciliation, releasing resentment, and moving on from conflict.

name: Six of Swords
upright_meaning: Transition, moving on, and leaving hardship behind.
reversed_meaning: Resistance to change, unresolved issues, and stuck in turmoil.

name: Seven of Swords
upright_meaning: Deception, strategy, and acting alone.
reversed_meaning: Coming clean, facing consequences, and self-deceit revealed.

name: Eight of Swords
upright_meaning: Restriction, self-imposed limitation, and feeling trapped.
reversed_meaning: Release, new perspective, and empowerment.

name: Nine of Swords
upright_meaning: Anxiety, worry, and mental anguish.
reversed_meaning: Hope returning, releasing fear, and inner peace.

name: Page of Swords
upright_meaning: Curiosity, mental energy, and seeking truth.
reversed_meaning: Gossip, scattered thoughts, and all talk no action.

name: Knight of Swords
upright_meaning: Ambition, fast action, and direct communication.
reversed_meaning: Recklessness, impulsiveness, and burnout.

name: Queen of Swords
upright_meaning: Independent thinking, clear boundaries, and honesty.
reversed_meaning: Coldness, bitterness, and overly critical judgment.

name: King of Swords
upright_meaning: Clear judgment, authority, and intellectual power.
reversed_meaning: Manipulation, abuse of power, and harsh judgment.

name: Ten of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Legacy, long-term success, and family wealth.
reversed_meaning: Financial loss, family disputes, and instability.

name: Ace of Pentacles
upright_meaning: New opportunity, prosperity, and manifestation.
reversed_meaning: Missed opportunity, lack of planning, and scarcity mindset.

name: Two of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Balance, adaptability, and juggling priorities.
reversed_meaning: Overwhelm, disorganization, and overextending resources.

name: Three of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Collaboration, skill, and teamwork toward a goal.
reversed_meaning: Lack of teamwork, misalignment, and poor workmanship.

name: Four of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Security, saving, and holding onto resources.
reversed_meaning: Greed, materialism, and fear of loss.

name: Five of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Hardship, financial loss, and feeling left out in the cold.
reversed_meaning: Recovery, finding support, and improving circumstances.

name: Six of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Generosity, giving and receiving, and charity.
reversed_meaning: Strings attached, debt, and imbalance of power.

name: Seven of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Patience, long-term investment, and assessment of progress.
reversed_meaning: Impatience, lack of reward, and reevaluating effort.

name: Eight of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Diligence, mastery, and dedication to craft.
reversed_meaning: Perfectionism, lack of focus, and mediocrity.

name: Nine of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Independence, luxury, and self-sufficiency.
reversed_meaning: Overwork, isolation, and superficial success.

name: Page of Pentacles
upright_meaning: New opportunity, studiousness, and manifestation in progress.
reversed_meaning: Lack of progress, procrastination, and unrealistic goals.

name: Knight of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Reliability, hard work, and methodical progress.
reversed_meaning: Laziness, stagnation, and boredom with routine.

name: Queen of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Practicality, nurturing, and down-to-earth resourcefulness.
reversed_meaning: Self-centeredness, imbalance, and neglecting responsibilities.

name: King of Pentacles
upright_meaning: Abundance, security, and disciplined leadership.
reversed_meaning: Materialism, stubbornness, and poor financial decisions.
